stemHtml:
Given the following information, what is the distance from the end of the TODR to 1500 ft above reference zero for the purpose of obstacle clearance for a performance class B aeroplane?

Cloud base: 400 ft above reference zero 
TAS: 97 kt 
Headwind component: 12 kt 
All engines rate of climb at take-off power: 1720 ft/min 
Single engine rate of climb at take-off power: 325 ft /min
